title: euphrasia fennica f. brevidens
intro: Euphrasia fennica f. brevidens, also known as a type of eyebright, is a subspecies of perennial herb native to Finland and other parts of Northern Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which help to soothe and calm the eyes, as well as its antimicrobial and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing eye strain and inflammation, improving vision, and providing antioxidant properties to protect against cell damage. Euphrasia fennica f. brevidens can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used in homeopathic remedies to support eye health and alleviate symptoms of conjunctivitis and other eye conditions.
